beats.what: The woman looks up from the computer screen with a surprised or confused expression.
The woman looks back at the monitor and begins typing on the keyboard.
The woman continues to type on the keyboard while looking at the screen.
The woman focuses intently on the screen while typing.
The woman continues typing steadily on the keyboard.
The woman looks down at the keyboard while typing.

formal.text: The subject observes the monitor with confusion.
The subject maintains intense focus on the monitor.
The subject performs steady keyboard input.
The subject inspects the keyboard during input.

sarcastic.text: Ah, a sudden moment of profound clarity.
Back to the thrilling world of data entry.
The sheer intensity is actually quite intimidating.
Still typing. Still living the dream.
Now she's even checking the tools of her greatness.

humorous_tech.text: Wait, that error message shouldn't be there.
Time to aggressively type my way out of this.
Just adding a single semicolon to fix everything.
Deep in the zone of pure technical debt.
Still typing. Still no idea why it works now.
Checking if I actually hit the right keys.

humorous_non_tech.text: Wait, did I just say that out loud?
Better just type it and pretend it was a typo.
Just keep typing. Don't look up.
Eyes on the prize. Or at least the screen.
Typing like my life depends on it.
Now, where did all those keys go?
